title: cyrtandra bilobata
intro: Cyrtandra bilobata is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the bilobed cyrtandra. It is a plant native to New Guinea, and its leaves have been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyrtandra bilobata include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Cyrtandra bilobata typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap the plant's medicinal benefits.
